title: Cells 49557Ceta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:49557Ceta.jpg|thumb|right|200px|View of Cells 49557Ceta from above.]]
'''Cells 49557Ceta''' was a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] complex of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Located in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|undercity]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], it was a high-security establishment made to hold [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] prisoners awaiting shipment to permanent off-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] prisons. It was permeated by a sense of despair that was said to be its best defense.<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku">[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]</ref>

[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]] was imprisoned in Cells 49557Ceta for a time in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].<ref name="Jedi: Count Dooku" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]''
